mapper.select: SELECT skill_id, staff_id, service_id, proficiency_level, certificate_url, certificate_status, experience_years, create_time, update_time FROM staff_service_skill WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
SELECT skill_id, staff_id, service_id, proficiency_level, certificate_url, certificate_status, experience_years, create_time, update_time FROM staff_service_skill WHERE service_id = #{serviceId}

SELECT skill_id, staff_id, service_id, proficiency_level, certificate_url, certificate_status, experience_years, create_time, update_time FROM staff_service_skill WHERE staff_id = #{staffId} AND service_id = #{serviceId}
SELECT skill_id, staff_id, service_id, proficiency_level, certificate_url, certificate_status, experience_years, create_time, update_time FROM staff_service_skill WHERE skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_service_skill (staff_id, service_id, proficiency_level, certificate_url, certificate_status, experience_years) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{serviceId}, #{proficiencyLevel}, #{certificateUrl}, #{certificateStatus}, #{experienceYears})
mapper.update: UPDATE staff_service_skill SET certificate_status = #{certificateStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE skill_id = #{skillId}
